steps.title: Use the causal clue
steps.content: The passage says there are over 500,000 minor planets, making the already challenging task of finding a unique name for each nearly blank. The word must show that the huge number makes the task almost impossible.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: A means large or significant, C means not needed, and D means allowed. None expresses an almost impossible task. The word meaning impossible to overcome matches the effect of having to name so many bodies. The answer is B.
